sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Inc stock (US0970231058): Is its travel recovery strength enough to sustain premium
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. continues to dominate the online travel sector through brands like Booking.com and Priceline, leveraging a dual merchant and agency model for robust revenue despite economic headwinds. The company's strategic focus on AI-driven personalization, expanded connected trip solutions, and growth in high-potential markets like alternative accommodations positions it well for sustained profitability as global travel demands stabilize. For investors, Booking Holdings offers exposure to a resilient growth sector with a strong competitive moat and positive analyst outlook, though risks like economic slowdowns and regulatory scrutiny warrant monitoring.

feed.title: Score Free Chipotle To Celebrate Start Of 2026 NHL Playoffs: Here's How
feed.summary: Chipotle is offering a buy-one-get-one-free (BOGO) deal on April 20th, 2026, to celebrate the start of the NHL Playoffs. Customers wearing a hockey jersey can get a free entrée with the purchase of another in-store after 3 p.m. at participating US and Canada locations, with the offer limited to five free items per transaction. This promotion continues a tradition following the NHL's partnership extension with Chipotle.

feed.title: How Will AmEx's Hyper Acquisition Expand Its AI Capabilities?
feed.summary: American Express (AmEx) is acquiring Hypercard, an AI-driven expense management platform, to enhance its commercial services and streamline business workflows. This acquisition aims to integrate AI into AmEx's product ecosystem, improving efficiency and offering personalized financial solutions. Competitors like Visa and Mastercard are also expanding their AI capabilities in fraud detection, risk management, and payment processing.

feed.title: Apple May Have Hidden a Big Clue About the Future of Siri in This Graphic
feed.summary: Apple's recent WWDC 2026 graphic, featuring a glowing "26," is sparking speculation about major updates to Siri. Reports suggest the glowing effect hints at Siri's new look and functionality within the iPhone's Dynamic Island, including a glowing border and cursor. These updates are expected to introduce an app-based chatbot interface, support third-party AI agents, and improve task management for Siri.

feed.title: Tesla Technically Launched Robotaxis in Dallas and Houston (Just in Time for Quarterly Earnings)
feed.summary: Tesla has "technically" launched its Robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston but with extremely limited availability, seemingly to boost investor confidence before quarterly earnings. Only a few vehicles are active, primarily used by influencers, with long wait times for the average person. This limited rollout strategy mirrors a previous instance with Austin's service, which also saw slow adoption and safety concerns.

feed.title: Medtronic plc stock (IE00BTN1Y115): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is altering how retail investors access information on Medtronic plc stock (IE00BTN1Y115), prioritizing personalized, mobile-first financial content. This update, completed by February 27, 2026, decouples Discover from traditional search, instead using Web and App Activity to proactively deliver tailored insights on Medtronic's performance, innovations, and market positioning directly to users' feeds. For investors, this means faster access to critical information on Medtronic's various segments and strategic moves, enhancing decision-making in the dynamic medtech sector.

feed.title: Newsweek names Ameriprise to first America's Most Charitable list
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial has been recognized by Newsweek as one of "America’s Most Charitable Companies 2026" for its strong commitment to charitable giving, employee volunteering, and community engagement. The company supports over 8,000 nonprofits globally through grants, volunteerism, and gift-matching programs, with employees contributing over 50,000 volunteer hours in 2025. This inaugural list by Newsweek and Statista evaluated companies based on consumer surveys, social listening, and philanthropic performance metrics.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc stock (US9256521090): Is its gaming real estate focus strong enough to unlock ne
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. (US9256521090) is a REIT specializing in experiential properties like casinos, utilizing a triple-net lease model for stable income and consistent dividends. The article explores its business model, growth drivers, competitive advantages in the gaming real estate sector, and its appeal to investors in the U.S. and English-speaking markets. It also highlights analyst views and potential risks such as tenant concentration and interest rate sensitivity.

feed.title: Trimble Inc. Extends Support for LMU’s Civil and Environmental Engineering Students
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. has extended its support for Loyola Marymount University's Civil and Environmental Engineering students through a multi-year agreement, donating subscriptions for its architectural, engineering, and construction (AEC) software to the LMU Trimble Technology Lab. This enables students to gain hands-on experience with industry-standard tools from their first year. Additionally, the Trimble Foundation Fund has granted $25,000 to the LMU Seaver Summer Opportunities for Advanced Research (SOAR) program to inspire the next generation of AEC professionals.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Encourages IT Stockholders to Contact the Firm for Information About the Class Action Against Gartner, Inc.
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is encouraging stockholders of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) to contact their firm regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner misled investors about its growth and projected revenue between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, causing a significant stock price drop after declining CV growth rates were announced. Shareholders have until May 18, 2026, to submit papers to the court to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. stock (US17275R1023): Is networking demand resilience the key to renewed upside?
feed.summary: Cisco Systems, Inc. maintains its strong position in global networking infrastructure, benefiting from increased data traffic driven by cloud and AI adoption. The company's hybrid business model, combining hardware sales with growing subscription-based software and services, provides stability and growth potential for investors. Cisco's strategic diversification into cybersecurity through acquisitions like Splunk, coupled with its focus on full-stack solutions and free cash flow generation, addresses evolving market demands and secures its role as a key player in the digital economy.

feed.title: Steel Stocks Break Out With Earnings Due
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) and Nucor (NUE) stocks saw breakouts and surges ahead of their first-quarter earnings reports, following positive news from Cleveland-Cliffs (CLF). Despite Cleveland-Cliffs signaling an improved outlook for the steel sector, its stock fell due to extended negotiations with South Korea's Posco. This indicates a mixed but generally positive sentiment for the steel industry as earnings season begins.

feed.title: PYPL DEADLINE - FINAL REMINDER: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC reminds investors of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) about a class action lawsuit filed against the company and its officers. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made false and misleading statements regarding its projected revenue outlook and growth strategy during the period between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. PayPal investors who suffered losses have until April 20, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: CNC Maintained by Jefferies -- Price Target Raised to $39
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a 'Hold' rating on Centene (CNC) while increasing its price target from $37.00 to $39.00. Despite this, the stock is considered significantly undervalued by GuruFocus metrics, with a GF Value™ of $94.54 compared to its current price of $38.60, representing a 59.2% undervaluation. The company exhibits strong profitability and financial strength but shows lower growth and valuation ranks, and there has been no recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: IBM Maintained by Jefferies -- Price Target Lowered to $320
feed.summary: Jefferies analyst Brent Thill has maintained a 'Buy' rating for IBM but lowered the price target from $370 to $320. Despite the lowered target, the 'Buy' rating suggests continued confidence in IBM's ability to capitalize on growth. GuruFocus assesses IBM as 20.0% overvalued at its current price of $253.16 compared to its GF Value™ of $211.04, with a strong GF Score™ of 83/100.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Completes Acquisition of For the Record
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (TYL) has successfully acquired For the Record (FTR), a move aimed at expanding its technology offerings and footprint in the legal and judicial sectors. This strategic acquisition enhances Tyler Technologies' ability to provide comprehensive solutions to public sector clients and reinforces its commitment to innovation and growth in the industry. The company encourages investors and stakeholders to stay informed about its ongoing strategic initiatives.

feed.title: ImmunityBio Inc stock (US45258J1025): Is its immunotherapy pipeline strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: ImmunityBio Inc. is positioned as a key player in biotech with its immunotherapy platform designed to combat cancer and infectious diseases. The company's lead candidate, Anktiva, shows promise in non-muscle invasive bladder cancer, with ongoing trials expanding its potential to other difficult-to-treat cancers. ImmunityBio's strategy involves combining engineered bacteria, cell therapies, and antibody constructs to stimulate broad immune responses, aiming for long-lasting protection against tumors and addressing large oncology markets.

feed.title: Changes coming to 650 Walmart stores this year: What customers can expect
feed.summary: Walmart announced plans to remodel over 650 of its stores this year, including Supercenters and Neighborhood Markets, as part of a "significant investment" in its physical locations. The renovations will bring wider aisles, expanded services, updated digital touchpoints, and refreshed interiors and exteriors. Additionally, Walmart intends to open 20 new stores in 2026 and early 2027, with some locations already opened in California and Florida.

feed.title: Amazon.com Inc., NVIDIA Corp. share losses contribute to Dow's nearly 150-point drop
feed.summary: Losses for shares of Amazon.com Inc. and NVIDIA Corp. contributed to the Dow Jones Industrial Average's decline, with the Dow falling 149 points. Other technology and internet service companies, including Microsoft Corp. and Salesforce Inc., also experienced share price drops, further impacting the index.

feed.title: Bank of Hope Lands Deal
feed.summary: Bank of Hope announced its acquisition of SMBC Manubank’s commercial banking unit in California for an undisclosed amount. This all-cash deal, expected to close in the second half of the year, will add $2.5 billion in loans and $2.7 billion in deposits, along with eight commercial banking branches. The acquisition is projected to significantly boost Bank of Hope's earnings per share by over 20% in 2027 and expand its presence in cross-border middle market banking, particularly targeting Korean and Japanese clients.

feed.title: Shield AI In Running For US Navy's $800 Million Surveillance Program
feed.summary: Shield AI is in contention for an $800 million U.S. Navy surveillance program, utilizing its V-BAT vertical-takeoff-and-landing uncrewed aircraft for airborne monitoring. The company, founded in 2015, recently secured significant funding rounds, including a $240 million strategic round that boosted its valuation to $5.3 billion, and an agreement to co-lead a $1.5 billion Series G funding round. These investments support the development of its Hivemind Enterprise product and broader national security initiatives.

feed.title: Reese's family member escalates battle with Hershey over chocolate ingredients, blasts 'PR stunt'
feed.summary: Brad Reese, grandson of Reese's founder H.B. Reese, criticized The Hershey Company for allegedly replacing milk chocolate with cheaper vegetable fats in certain seasonal products, calling Hershey's plan to restore classic recipes by 2027 a "PR stunt." Reese claims the change makes the candy inedible and that Hershey could revert to original ingredients much faster. However, other Reese family members have distanced themselves from Brad's claims, stating they do not share his views and that the core recipes for classic Reese's and Hershey's bars remain unchanged.

feed.title: The Procter & Gamble Company stock (US7427181091): Why does its everyday essentials dominance matter
feed.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (PG) stock offers stability and reliable returns due to its dominance in everyday essentials like Tide and Pampers. Its business model, focused on high-margin consumer goods, ensures steady cash flows and makes it an attractive investment for those seeking stability amidst economic uncertainty. P&G's global reach, continuous innovation, and strong competitive position further solidify its appeal to U.S. and global investors.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $1,077,000 Capped Buffered Equity Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to the lesser performing of the Invesco QQQ Trust SM, Series 1 and the S&P 500 Index, maturing on October 21, 2027. Investors can achieve a 1.00 times appreciation of the lesser performing underlying, up to a maximum return of 45.00%, but risk losing up to 85.00% of their principal.

feed.title: Duke Energy proposal for natural gas expansion near Amazon data center up for hearing
feed.summary: Duke Energy is proposing to add a natural gas unit at an existing complex near Amazon's new $10 billion data center in Richmond County. This proposal will be subject to a public hearing as Duke Energy seeks to increase rates to fund new generation construction to meet rising power demand. The article highlights the growing demand for energy from data centers and the ongoing discussions around their impact in North Carolina.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) 5.70% Callable Notes due 2044
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp is offering 5.70% callable Senior Medium-Term Notes with a principal of $1,000 per Note, maturing on April 30, 2044, but subject to early redemption starting April 30, 2029. Interest will be paid annually on April 30, using a 30/360 day count. The Notes are priced at 100% of principal, with selling commissions up to $40.00 per $1,000, and are unsecured obligations, carrying the credit risk of U.S. Bancorp.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bank details new deposits, cost savings after completing $10.9B Comerica deal
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is reportedly ahead of schedule in realizing the benefits from its acquisition of Comerica, the largest in the bank's 168-year history. The article suggests that the bank is making significant progress toward achieving deposit growth and cost savings as anticipated from the $10.9 billion deal. Further details regarding these new deposits and cost savings are expected to be elaborated in the full article.

feed.title: Rifle City Council recognizes Funston, approves housing authority appointments and Sherwin-Williams annexation
feed.summary: The Rifle City Council held a meeting where they recognized retiring Police Chief Debra Funston for her 37 years of public service with a plaque. Additionally, the council approved two appointments to the Rifle Housing Authority Board and greenlit Sherwin-Williams' request to annex 1.01 acres for a new paint store on Airport Road.

feed.title: Inogen Inc stock (US45780L1044): Is its portable oxygen model strong enough for long-term investor r
feed.summary: Inogen Inc specializes in portable oxygen concentrators, targeting the growing home healthcare market, particularly for aging populations. The company's model focuses on lightweight, portable devices for chronic respiratory conditions, leveraging direct-to-consumer sales and insurance reimbursements. While positioned for growth due to demographic shifts and regulatory tailwinds, the article highlights challenges such as reimbursement cuts and competitive pressures that could impact long-term investor returns.

feed.title: Harley-Davidson bikes recalled over fears rear brakes could completely fail
feed.summary: Harley-Davidson has issued a major recall for 16,994 Softail models from model years 2025-2026, including the Heritage Classic, Street Bob, Low Rider S, and Low Rider ST. The recall addresses a defect where the rear brake line could contact the bike's onboard computer, potentially leading to a loss of brake fluid and complete braking failure. Owners will be notified starting May 18, and Harley-Davidson will replace the computer caddy and inspect/replace the brake line as needed.

feed.title: Southern Company boosts quarterly dividend to 76c from 74c
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) announced an increase in its quarterly dividend from 74 cents to 76 cents per share, payable on June 8 to shareholders of record as of May 18. This marks 25 consecutive years of dividend increases for the company, raising the annualized rate to $3.04 per share. The company emphasizes its commitment to total shareholder return and delivering predictable value.

feed.title: Duke Energy: 100-Year Dividend Track Record — But $103B Capex Is Compressing The Credit Cushion
feed.summary: Duke Energy boasts a 100-year dividend track record and strong operational foundation, but its massive $103 billion capital expenditure plan is putting pressure on its credit metrics. While the dividend is well-covered, the FFO-to-debt ratio is currently below Moody's target, raising concerns about the company's ability to maintain its credit cushion as it spends heavily before new revenues come online. Investors should monitor FFO-to-debt trajectory and the timely conversion of data center agreements into actual load.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Stock Analysis: Buy or Sell This Semiconductor Stock Before the Huge Update?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments is set to release a quarterly financial update that could significantly impact its shareholders. The company, a semiconductor stock, has shown strong growth recently. Investors are advised to consider the upcoming report when making buy or sell decisions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin ETF sees $100M inflows in first week
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's new spot Bitcoin ETF has attracted over $100 million in net inflows within its first week, driven by a competitive fee structure and easing geopolitical tensions. This institutional interest is strengthening predictions for Bitcoin to reach new all-time highs. The article suggests continued ETF adoption and geopolitical stability are key factors to watch.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America stock (US6951561022): Why does its packaging dominance matter more now for steady returns?
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PCA) is positioned as a strong investment due to its essential role in e-commerce and food supply chains, offering defensive stability and steady returns. The company's focus on corrugated boxes and paperboard, coupled with its integrated production and operational efficiency, makes it resilient during economic downturns. Analysts show a positive outlook, emphasizing PCA's ability to navigate cost pressures and its alignment with megatrends like sustainable packaging and online grocery.

feed.title: Southern Company increases dividend for 25th consecutive year
feed.summary: Southern Company has announced a regular quarterly dividend of 76 cents per share, marking the 25th consecutive year of dividend increases. This raises the annualized dividend to $3.04 per share. Chairman, President and CEO Chris Womack emphasized that this achievement underscores the company's commitment to total shareholder return and delivering predictable value.

feed.title: Crude Oil Surges Over 6%; Investar Holding Shares Gain Following Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: US stocks, including the Dow Jones, NASDAQ, and S&P 500, traded lower on Monday, while crude oil saw a significant surge of over 6%. Investar Holding Corp's shares gained more than 5% after reporting Q1 earnings that beat analyst estimates for adjusted earnings per share. Several other companies, including Enveric Biosciences, Sila Realty Trust, Clearmind Medicine, Passage Bio, Fermi Inc, and Sidus Space Inc, experienced notable stock movements due to various corporate announcements, including clinical trial results, acquisition agreements, and leadership changes.

feed.title: [DEF 14A] INTERNATIONAL BANCSHARES CORP Definitive Proxy Statement
feed.summary: International Bancshares Corporation will hold its 2026 annual shareholder meeting on May 18, 2026, to vote on electing eight directors, ratifying RSM US LLP as auditor, and approving executive compensation. The proxy statement details the company's corporate governance, executive compensation policies, and director independence. Shareholders of record as of April 1, 2026, are entitled to vote on these proposals.

feed.title: Kroger says delivery shoppers save 47 minutes as online sale begins
feed.summary: Kroger has launched its Online Deal Days from April 22 to May 5, offering significant savings on Pickup and Delivery orders, including $30 off first orders of $75+ and free delivery on orders over $50. The company highlights that delivery customers save an average of 47 minutes per order, while pickup customers save 29 minutes, emphasizing the convenience and efficiency of its online services. Boost by Kroger Plus members also receive additional exclusive discounts on produce, meat, and seafood during the event.

feed.title: State Street Had A 'Blockbuster' Q1, Analyst Says
feed.summary: State Street (NYSE:STT) reported a "blockbuster" first quarter, exceeding analyst expectations for both adjusted earnings per share and revenue. CEO Ron O'Hanley highlighted record fee revenue, net interest income, and total revenue, alongside significant operating leverage and pretax margin expansion. Following these strong results, several analysts, including RBC Capital, Truist Securities, Keefe Bruyette & Woods, and Morgan Stanley, increased their price targets for the company.

feed.title: PNC laying off nearly 800 after FirstBank acquisition
feed.summary: PNC Bank is laying off nearly 800 employees following its $4.1 billion acquisition of FirstBank. This move comes less than five months after the acquisition was finalized. The article, written by Lucas High, notes that subscribers can access more details.

feed.title: Potomac Edison Customers in Maryland Can Lower Their Bills With New Residential Time-of-Use Rate
feed.summary: Potomac Edison has introduced a new residential time-of-use rate for its Maryland customers, allowing them to pay less for electricity during off-peak hours. This rate encourages shifting high-energy activities to times when demand on the grid is lower, such as mornings, late evenings, and weekends. Customers can enroll by calling 1-800-686-0011 and will have their meter replaced to track on-peak and off-peak usage.

feed.title: Ralph Lauren stock hits all-time high at 389.38 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ralph Lauren (RL) stock reached an all-time high of $389.38, marking a 90.61% increase over the past year, driven by strong financial performance including a nearly 70% gross profit margin and a perfect Piotroski Score of 9. Despite an InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock is currently overvalued, recent fiscal Q3 2026 results surpassed forecasts, with analysts like UBS and BofA Securities maintaining positive ratings and raising price targets. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.9125 per share.

feed.title: Investar Holding Corp seeks banking talent to expand Hammond LA team
feed.summary: Investar Holding Corp is expanding its team in Hammond, Louisiana, and is currently seeking a Business Banking Relationship Manager II. This recruitment drive follows recent initiatives by the company, including online certificate of deposit promotions and continued focus on digital banking accessibility. The company remains active in introducing new service offerings to its customers.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Corp stock (US6668071029): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors access information on Northrop Grumman Corp (NYSE:NOC) by pushing tailored financial content directly to mobile feeds. This update prioritizes proactive, mobile-first delivery of insights on defense contract wins, aerospace trends, and missile system developments, allowing retail investors to stay ahead without traditional searching. By leveraging user activity, Discover surfaces high-density stories, earnings recaps, and valuation metrics, democratizing access to critical market intelligence previously more accessible through institutional tools.

feed.title: Latest GIGGU News - GigCapital7 Corp. Announces Closing of $20...
feed.summary: GigCapital7 Corp. (GIGGU) has priced and closed its initial public offering, raising $200 million by offering 20,000,000 units at $10.00 each. Each unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one redeemable warrant. The net proceeds, including concurrent private offerings, reached approximately $201.95 million, with $200 million deposited into a trust account, and trading under 'GIGGU' began on August 29, 2024.

feed.title: ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX) Investors: May 26, 2026 Filing Deadline in Securities Class Action - Contact Lieff Cabraser
feed.summary: National plaintiffs law firm Lieff Cabraser Heimann & Bernstein, LLP has announced a securities class action lawsuit against ImmunityBio, Inc. (IBRX). Investors who purchased ImmunityBio securities between January 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for May 26, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that ImmunityBio's Executive Chairman, Patrick Soon-Shiong, misrepresented the capabilities of their bladder cancer drug Anktiva, leading to a significant stock drop after a U.S. FDA warning letter cited misleading promotional claims.

feed.title: Hut 8 shares rise as bitcoin firms and AI-infrastructure narrative stays in focus
feed.summary: Hut 8 (HUT) shares rose 3.0% due to positive bitcoin sentiment and investor focus on its AI data center infrastructure push, specifically a 15-year, 245 MW lease at its River Bend campus. Upcoming earnings in May 2026 are also contributing to market positioning. Insider trading shows sales, while institutional investors have largely increased their positions, and analysts maintain "Buy" ratings with a median target price of $75.0.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs is bullish on Philip Morris ahead of earnings (PM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs reiterates its bullish stance on Philip Morris International, citing the company's new report segmentation as a reinforcing factor. Philip Morris will now report on International Smoke-Free, International Combustibles, and U.S. business segments, moving away from its previous four-region structure. This change provides clearer insight into the company's operational performance.

feed.title: Fix leaks, skip waste: Maryland utility marks Earth Day with water tips
feed.summary: Maryland American Water marked Earth Day by providing water-saving tips and stressing community involvement in protecting water resources. The company, serving about 24,000 customers, highlighted its efforts in source protection and infrastructure investment. They also reminded residents about National Prescription Drug Take Back Day on April 25th for safe medication disposal.
